en_body:
.................Hoàng-Ân..........
 the road...dust,
 dragging
 the Cross,
 upon a thin shoulder!
 Father,
 long ago...
 Golgotha,
 prepared Himself
 the banquet:
 Love!
 crown of thorns,
 woven, braided,
 fresh blood..
 when the sacred hour revealed
 the sun
 fell into darkness!
 Crown-Of-Thorns
 Victorious:
 GOD The Father..
 bestowed upon
 this
 world:
 Sacred Bread,
 Glowing Wine:
 the lamb
 offers sacrifice,
 eats the body,
 swallows crimson blood
 Father's Heart...
 ..the flower-offering
 bears our sins,
 praying redemption into
 the heart:
 Father's Love..!!

THE VICTORIOUS CROWN OF THORNS
note: The poem joins Christ's Passion at Golgotha with the Eucharistic Bread and Wine, transforming the crown of suffering into victory through redemptive Love.
